title: Pixcelz's Hypixel Skyblock Pack
description: A minimal mod which improves the Hypixel Skyblock Experience
body:
# Overview
This modpack uses 1.8.9 as the base and Forge as the modloader for this installation as many of the mods included in this modpack are only supported on 1.8.9

A very minimal modpack consisting only of a few mods which aim to improve the experience of Hypixel Skyblock leaving the gameplay untouched.

<font color=red>**Note:** This modpack requires Optifine</font>
  - A download can be found at [Optifine.net](https://optifine.net/downloads)

**Note:** Using shaders such as BSL shaders will greatly improve the visuals (Not included in modpack)
## Mods:
### QoL Mods:
- [Apec](https://modrinth.com/mod/apec)
- [Great Scrollable Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-scrollable-tooltips)
- [Not Enough Updates (NEU)](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates)

### Performance Mods:
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

## Resource Pack(s):
- [Furfsky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn)
